$comment: csharp: generate C# 5 for a task, compile it (csc_check, the oracle), and repair ONCE if it fails. generate -> compile -> done | fix -> recompile -> done | fail. The repair is bounded (one retry), unrolled (no cycle) so it lints clean and terminates.
summary: Generate C# 5 code for a focused task, compile it with the in-box csc, and repair once if it does not build.
